title: Epstein files 2% release — 2026-05-11
narrative: Attorney General Pam Bondi and Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche stated the DOJ has "fully released" or "completed" the Epstein files per the Epstein Files Transparency Act. DOJ called the January 30 release of ~3 million pages "final." Bondi told Congress the files were "complete" and that earlier accusations of a cover-up were "disinformation."
telemetry: DOJ published 3.5 million "responsive pages" — claimed as fulfillment of the act
Guardian (January 2026): DOJ released less than 1% by the December 19 statutory deadline — only 125,575 pages
YouTube investigation: claimed 300GB release accounts for "just 2%" of total Epstein data officials discussed last year
CBS News / NPR: DOJ released "final" 3 million pages on January 30, 2026 — over a month after deadline
Pam Bondi's own letter to federal judge admitted DOJ has "not released 99%" of Epstein files — directly contradicting her public statements
New Republic: Pam Bondi claims "everything has been released" — report contradicts this
Core contradiction: DOJ calls 2% "complete" while Bondi's own legal filing acknowledges 99% unreleased
analysis:
Official sources say one thing. The evidence says another. AG Bondi's own court filing is the telemetry. Her public complete testimony and her legal 99% not released letter cannot both be true. The gap between her press statements and her courtroom admissions is the story — not whether the files exist, but that the DOJ's top lawyer has privately acknowledged what she publicly denied.

• DOJ published 3.5 million "responsive pages" — claimed as fulfillment of the act
• Guardian (January 2026): DOJ released less than 1% by the December 19 statutory deadline — only 125,575 pages
• YouTube investigation: claimed 300GB release accounts for "just 2%" of total Epstein data officials discussed last year
• CBS News / NPR: DOJ released "final" 3 million pages on January 30, 2026 — over a month after deadline

The pattern in the telemetry — 7 independent data points — points in a consistent direction that the official narrative does not acknowledge. When the official framing and the physical evidence are in contradiction, the evidence is the more reliable signal. The gap between what officials claim and what the data shows is the story.
